text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The moment of interception of a UAV near Harir Air Base in Iraq's Erbil Governorate short time ago. The base is known to house US forces. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042365397110755412/video/1 US forces are engaging hostile drones over Erbil Governorate in northern Iraq, these minutes. At least one interception noted. The drones likely belong to Iran-backed militias. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042364645227307480/video/1 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet

text: Open Source Intel EU Foreign Policy Chief kallas: We calls for an immediate halt to fighting in Lebanon and we urges all parties to respect the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement. “Israeli actions are putting the U.S.-Iran ceasefire under severe strain. The Iran truce should extend to Lebanon. Hezbollah must disarm.” She added that Hezbollah “dragged Lebanon into the war,” and said that “Israel’s right to defend itself does not justify inflicting such massive destruction.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 欧盟外交与安全政策高级代表卡拉斯：我们呼吁黎巴嫩立即停止战斗，并敦促各方尊重美伊停火协议。“以色列的行动正使美伊停火协议承受巨大压力。伊朗的停火协议应扩展至黎巴嫩。真主党必须解除武装。”她补充说，真主党“将黎巴嫩拖入了战争”，并表示“以色列的自卫权并不能证明造成如此大规模的破坏是正当的。” 推文

text: The Israeli Air Force struck some 10 Hezbollah rocket launchers in Lebanon that were used to fire at northern Israel in the past few hours, the military says. ✍ Good job hitting them after they already fired clowns
text_zh: 以色列军方称，以色列空军在过去几小时内打击了黎巴嫩境内约10个曾用于向以色列北部开火的真主党火箭发射器。✍ 干得好，在他们开火后才去打击，真是小丑

text: Open Source Intel After the latest Hezbollah rocket fire on northern Israel, the Israeli Air Force says it struck 10 Hezbollah launchers The IDF says it’s continuing to hunt launchers in Lebanon at this time https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042363476517978232/video/1 tweet

text: OSINTdefender Following the recent wave of rocket attacks against northern Israel by Lebanese Hezbollah, the Israeli Air Force announced that they targeted and struck 10 launchers that were used in past launches against Israel. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042362668468547821/video/1 tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The White House has warned staff not to place bets on prediction markets amid the Iran war following suspiciously timed trades tied to U.S. policy shifts. The warning comes after a surge in oil futures trading shortly before a strike pause announcement and reports of large profits from correctly timed ceasefire bets, though officials say there is no evidence of insider trading. @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 Islamic regime Fars News: "Until a ceasefire is established in Lebanon, Iran has no plan to participate in peace negotiations in Islamabad with the American side. The Wall Street Journal claimed a few minutes ago in a news report that an Iranian delegation has entered Islamabad to start negotiations with Washington, which is false" NOW: An Iranian delegation led by Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf has arrived in Islamabad for talks with the U.S., according to the Wall Street Journal. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 更新 🔴 伊斯兰政权法尔斯通讯社：“在黎巴嫩实现停火之前，伊朗没有计划在伊斯兰堡与美方参加和平谈判。华尔街日报几分钟前在一篇新闻报道中声称，一个伊朗代表团已进入伊斯兰堡开始与华盛顿进行谈判，这是虚假的” 现在：据华尔街日报报道，由阿巴斯·阿拉格希和穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫率领的伊朗代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。- Open Source Intel 推文

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇰 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar: Israel views very gravely these blatant antisemitic blood libels from a government claiming to “mediate peace.” Calling the Jewish state “cancerous” is effectively calling for its annihilation. Israel will defend itself against terrorists who vow its destruction.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇵🇰 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔：以色列非常严肃地看待这些来自一个声称“调解和平”的政府的公然反犹太血腥诽谤。称犹太国家为“癌细胞”实际上是在呼吁将其消灭。以色列将保护自己免受那些誓言要摧毁它的恐怖分子的侵害。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Wall Street Journal: The Wall Street Journal, one of the worst and most inaccurate “Editorial Boards” in the World, stated that I “declared premature victory in Iran.” Actually, it is a Victory, and there’s nothing “premature” about it! Because of me, IRAN WILL NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON and, very quickly, you’ll see Oil start flowing, with or without the help of Iran and, to me, it makes no difference, either way. The Wall Street Journal will, as usual, live to eat their words. They are always quick to criticize, but never to admit when they’re wrong, which is most of the time! @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈华尔街日报：华尔街日报，世界上最糟糕、最不准确的“编辑委员会”之一，声称我“在伊朗宣布了过早的胜利”。实际上，这是一场胜利，没有什么“过早”的！因为我，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器，而且很快，你就会看到石油开始流动，无论有没有伊朗的帮助，对我来说，这没什么区别。华尔街日报将一如既往地自食其果。他们总是急于批评，却从不承认自己错了，而他们大部分时间都是错的！@wfwitness

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ Khawaja Asif, Pakistan's Defense Minister on Israeli attacks on Lebanon: "Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell,"
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡ 巴基斯坦国防部长赫瓦贾·阿西夫谈以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击：“以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒。当伊斯兰堡正在进行和平谈判时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜公民正被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上制造了这个癌细胞国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人下地狱，"

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: An Iranian delegation led by Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf arrived in Islamabad for talks with the U.S. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 由阿巴斯·阿拉格希和穆罕默德-巴吉尔·卡利巴夫率领的伊朗代表团抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。来源：华尔街日报

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇷🇺🇺🇦 Russian President Putin has declared a ceasefire in connection with the approaching Orthodox Easter. The truce will be in effect from 16:00 on 11 April until the end of 12 April 2026. Russia expects Ukraine to follow its example. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy says Ukraine will respect the Easter ceasefire, he claims was proposed by Ukraine. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇷🇺🇺🇦 俄罗斯总统普京宣布因东正教复活节临近而停火。停火将于2026年4月11日16:00生效，直至4月12日结束。俄罗斯希望乌克兰效仿。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，乌克兰将尊重复活节停火，他声称这是由乌克兰提出的。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Does Trump even get intelligence briefings? Bro... they're charging in yuan and crypto. Have been for a while. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 特朗普甚至能收到情报简报吗？兄弟……他们正在用人民币和加密货币结算。已经有一段时间了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics
